title: Biological Foundation Models — records under review
description: Audited candidates excluded from the displayed canonical index until their scope, artifact, identity, duplication, or reuse-term issue is resolved.

policy.promotion_rule: A record may move into models_final.json only after the stated reconsideration condition is met, primary evidence is refreshed, and the full maintenance gate passes.

record.name: mRNA-FM / PlantRNA-FM
record.description: RNA-FM-derived models specialized for coding mRNA or plant RNA.
record.status: HOLD — family record mixes two models with incomplete paper evidence and different terms
record.io: RNA sequence +/- structure tokens -> embeddings/task outputs
record.use_cases: Translation dynamics, plant RNA function, mRNA feature prediction
record.audit_note: only PlantRNA-FM has a primary paper link and the two model cards carry different licences. Split or fully evidence both components.

review.reason: only PlantRNA-FM has a primary paper link and the two model cards carry different licences. Split or fully evidence both components.
review.reconsider_when: Split the family or verify each member with its own primary evidence, artifact locator, and licence.

record.name: SATURN
record.description: Cross-species cell embedding model using protein-language-model gene features.
record.status: HOLD — method code and derived embeddings exist, but no reusable pretrained SATURN checkpoint was verified
record.io: scRNA counts + protein embeddings + labels -> shared cell embedding
record.use_cases: Cross-species integration, homologous cell type mapping
record.audit_note: repository provides training code, embeddings and derived macrogene weights, not a reusable pretrained SATURN checkpoint. HOLD or reclassify as method.

review.reason: repository provides training code, embeddings and derived macrogene weights, not a reusable pretrained SATURN checkpoint. HOLD or reclassify as method.
review.reconsider_when: Reconsider when an official reusable pretrained SATURN checkpoint is released and its terms are verified, or reclassify outside model scope.

record.name: xTrimoGene
record.description: Efficient scalable representation learner for scRNA-seq.
record.status: HOLD — paper only; no official reusable code or checkpoint verified
record.io: Sparse scRNA vector -> embeddings/task predictions
record.use_cases: Annotation, perturbation response, drug-combination prediction
record.audit_note: paper-only with no official code or checkpoint. HOLD under the reusable-artifact rule.

review.reason: paper-only with no official code or checkpoint. HOLD under the reusable-artifact rule.
review.reconsider_when: Reconsider when official reusable code or a checkpoint is released and verified.

record.name: scPROTEIN
record.description: Graph contrastive model for single-cell proteomics embeddings.
record.status: HOLD — task framework with dataset-specific checkpoints; broad pretrained-model scope unverified
record.io: Single-cell proteomics data -> embeddings
record.use_cases: Mass cytometry/CyTOF-style proteomic cell analysis
record.audit_note: dataset-specific analysis framework/checkpoints do not substantiate a broadly pretrained foundation model. HOLD or reclassify outside scope.

review.reason: dataset-specific analysis framework/checkpoints do not substantiate a broadly pretrained foundation model. HOLD or reclassify outside scope.
review.reconsider_when: Reconsider if broader reusable pretraining is evidenced or a written scope-policy revision explicitly includes this class.

record.name: DeepSEA
record.description: Pioneering deep-learning sequence model that predicts 919 chromatin features (TF binding, DNase, histone marks) from DNA with single-nucleotide sensitivity to prioritize noncoding variants.
record.io: DNA sequence (~1 kb) -> 919 chromatin feature predictions; noncoding variant effect scores
record.status: HOLD — catalog eligibility or reusable-artifact evidence is unresolved; see audit note
record.use_cases: Noncoding/eQTL/disease variant prioritization, chromatin feature prediction, regulatory sequence analysis
record.audit_note: Identity is correct, but the linked artifact is the later Selene framework, and DeepSEA is a supervised regulatory predictor rather than an unambiguous reusable FM. Decide whether it is a documented historical/canonical exception. Paper, Selene.

review.reason: Identity is correct, but the linked artifact is the later Selene framework, and DeepSEA is a supervised regulatory predictor rather than an unambiguous reusable FM. Decide whether it is a documented historical/canonical exception. Paper, Selene.
review.reconsider_when: Reconsider only under a written historical-exception policy with the original artifact correctly identified.

record.name: ChromBPNet
record.description: Kundaje-lab bias-factorized, base-resolution CNN of chromatin accessibility (ATAC/DNase) that deconvolves enzyme bias to reveal TF motifs, footprints and regulatory variants.
record.io: DNA sequence -> base-resolution accessibility profiles; TF motif/footprint and variant-effect outputs
record.status: HOLD — catalog eligibility or reusable-artifact evidence is unresolved; see audit note
record.use_cases: cis-regulatory syntax discovery, TF footprinting, regulatory variant scoring, enhancer/accessibility modeling
record.audit_note: Current paper/repo describe a bias-factorized chromatin-accessibility predictor trained per assay, not clearly a reusable multi-task foundation model. Reassess against the stated scope rule or document an exception. Paper, repo.

review.reason: Current paper/repo describe a bias-factorized chromatin-accessibility predictor trained per assay, not clearly a reusable multi-task foundation model. Reassess against the stated scope rule or document an exception. Paper, repo.
review.reconsider_when: Reconsider if a written scope policy includes assay-specific predictors or broader reusable pretraining is evidenced.

record.name: Mistral-DNA
record.description: Family of compact DNA language models adapting the Mistral/Mixtral architecture to genomics, pretrained via causal language modeling on human (hg38) and other genomes.
record.io: DNA sequence -> embeddings, next-token likelihoods, generated DNA; fine-tuned task heads
record.status: HOLD — primary paper absent and referenced checkpoint could not be verified
record.use_cases: Genomic sequence classification, DNA generation, fine-tuning for regulatory/variant tasks, teaching/tutorials
record.audit_note: no primary paper, linked checkpoint currently unauthorized, and direct model-card URL is absent. HOLD until checkpoint and terms are verifiable.

review.reason: no primary paper, linked checkpoint currently unauthorized, and direct model-card URL is absent. HOLD until checkpoint and terms are verifiable.
review.reconsider_when: Reconsider when a primary source, authorized checkpoint, direct model card, and exact terms are all verified.

record.name: FloraBERT
record.description: RoBERTa-based plant DNA language model (47M params) pretrained on ~11.7M plant promoter sequences and fine-tuned to predict tissue-specific maize gene expression across species.
record.io: Plant promoter DNA sequence -> embeddings; predicted tissue-specific gene expression (TPM, 8 maize tissues)
record.status: HOLD — catalog eligibility or reusable-artifact evidence is unresolved; see audit note
record.use_cases: Cross-species gene-expression prediction from promoters, promoter representation learning, crop transfer learning
record.audit_note: Official description focuses on plant promoter modelling and tissue-specific gene-expression prediction; broad reusable FM scope is not established. Paper, repo.

review.reason: Official description focuses on plant promoter modelling and tissue-specific gene-expression prediction; broad reusable FM scope is not established. Paper, repo.
review.reconsider_when: Reconsider if broader reusable foundation-model scope is established by primary evidence.

record.name: DRfold
record.description: End-to-end deep-learning RNA tertiary-structure predictor combining learned local frame rotations and geometric restraints (MSA-free); DRfold2 (2026) adds a pretrained RNA Composite Language Model (RCLM) and a denoising structure module for end-to-end ab initio folding.
record.io: RNA sequence (+ secondary structure) -> predicted 3D tertiary structure (atomic resolution)
record.status: HOLD — catalog eligibility or reusable-artifact evidence is unresolved; see audit note
record.use_cases: Ab initio / single-sequence RNA 3D structure prediction without MSA
record.audit_note: DRfold/DRfold2 are RNA structure predictors; DRfold2 contains a pretrained RCLM component, but the catalogue record itself remains one-task structure prediction. HOLD or define a structural-model exception. DRfold paper, DRfold2 paper, DRfold, DRfold2.

review.reason: DRfold/DRfold2 are RNA structure predictors; DRfold2 contains a pretrained RCLM component, but the catalogue record itself remains one-task structure prediction. HOLD or define a structural-model exception. DRfold paper, DRfold2 paper, DRfold, DRfold2.
review.reconsider_when: Reconsider only under a written structural-model exception or after reframing around an evidenced reusable pretrained component.

record.name: FrameDiff / FrameFlow / Multiflow
record.description: Family of SE(3) frame-based generative models for protein backbones: FrameDiff (diffusion), FrameFlow (flow matching, ~5x fewer steps), and Multiflow (joint sequence-structure co-design over discrete + continuous state spaces via Discrete Flow Models).
record.io: Noise / length (+ optional motif) -> generated backbone frames; Multiflow -> joint backbone + sequence
record.status: HOLD — record conflates three distinct methods; split or narrow to MultiFlow
record.use_cases: De novo backbone generation, fast flow-matching sampling, protein sequence-structure co-design, motif scaffolding
record.audit_note: Improperly merges three distinct methods while citing only Multiflow’s paper/repo. Either keep Multiflow alone or add separate FrameDiff and FrameFlow evidence/records. Multiflow ICML, Multiflow repo, FrameDiff paper, FrameDiff repo, FrameFlow paper, FrameFlow repo.

review.reason: Improperly merges three distinct methods while citing only Multiflow’s paper/repo. Either keep Multiflow alone or add separate FrameDiff and FrameFlow evidence/records. Multiflow ICML, Multiflow repo, FrameDiff paper, FrameDiff repo, FrameFlow paper, FrameFlow repo.
review.reconsider_when: Split FrameDiff, FrameFlow, and MultiFlow into independently evidenced records, or narrow this record to one system.

record.name: Protriever
record.description: End-to-end differentiable retrieval-augmented protein language model (Marks/OATML) that jointly learns homology search and fitness prediction via efficient vector search.
record.io: Query sequence + learned-retrieved homologs (e.g. UniRef) -> autoregressive fitness/variant scores, embeddings
record.status: HOLD — official repository is a README placeholder; no released code, checkpoint or licence verified
record.use_cases: MSA-free / fast homology-aware fitness prediction, variant effect prediction, retrieval-augmented protein modeling
record.audit_note: official repository contains only README, not open code or weights. HOLD and correct status to placeholder/paper only.

review.reason: official repository contains only README, not open code or weights. HOLD and correct status to placeholder/paper only.
review.reconsider_when: Reconsider when official executable code or reusable weights are released and verified.

record.name: ProtGPS
record.description: ESM-2-based model (MIT/Whitehead) predicting protein subcellular compartment/condensate localization (12 classes) and generating sequences targeted to a chosen compartment.
record.io: Protein sequence -> predicted compartment / mutation effect on localization; or compartment target -> generated sequence
record.status: HOLD — catalog eligibility or reusable-artifact evidence is unresolved; see audit note
record.use_cases: Subcellular/condensate localization prediction, disease-mutation localization-shift analysis, generative design of compartment-targeted proteins
record.audit_note: Model is centred on one localization objective—12-compartment prediction and localization-conditioned generation. Reassess broad-FM eligibility. Paper, repo.

review.reason: Model is centred on one localization objective—12-compartment prediction and localization-conditioned generation. Reassess broad-FM eligibility. Paper, repo.
review.reconsider_when: Reconsider if broader reusable foundation-model scope is established or a written task-specific exception is adopted.

record.name: NeuralPLexer (and NeuralPLexer3)
record.description: Multiscale deep generative model for protein-ligand complex structure prediction and ligand-induced conformational states from protein sequence + ligand graph (diffusion in v1; NeuralPLexer3 uses flow matching for physio-realistic biomolecular complexes).
record.io: Protein sequence + ligand molecular graph (+optional templates) -> protein-ligand complex 3D structure / conformational ensemble
record.status: HOLD — v1 and NP3 are conflated and have different artifact availability/terms
record.use_cases: Co-folding / blind docking, structure-based drug design, modeling ligand-induced conformational change
record.audit_note: Family conflates v1 and NP3. V1 checkpoints are explicitly CC BY-NC-SA for non-commercial use, while linked repo/paper do not implement NP3. NP3 has a separate NeurIPS paper and no verified public code/weights in the cited artifact. v1 paper, v1 repo, v1 checkpoints, NP3 paper.

review.reason: Family conflates v1 and NP3. V1 checkpoints are explicitly CC BY-NC-SA for non-commercial use, while linked repo/paper do not implement NP3. NP3 has a separate NeurIPS paper and no verified public code/weights in the cited artifact. v1 paper, v1 repo, v1 checkpoints, NP3 paper.
review.reconsider_when: Split NeuralPLexer v1 and NP3 and verify each version's implementation, weights, and terms.

record.name: Uni-Mol Docking V2
record.description: Upgraded Uni-Mol-based protein-ligand docking model producing chemically realistic, high-accuracy binding poses (>77% of PoseBusters under 2A RMSD, avoiding chirality/steric-clash artifacts).
record.io: Protein pocket + ligand -> binding pose 3D coordinates
record.status: HOLD — catalog eligibility or reusable-artifact evidence is unresolved; see audit note
record.use_cases: Accurate binding-pose prediction, structure-based virtual screening, lead optimization
record.audit_note: Exact model is a dedicated docking predictor rather than an unambiguous broader-than-one-task FM. HOLD or document a structural/docking exception. Paper, repo.

review.reason: Exact model is a dedicated docking predictor rather than an unambiguous broader-than-one-task FM. HOLD or document a structural/docking exception. Paper, repo.
review.reconsider_when: Reconsider only under a written structural/docking exception or with evidence of broader reusable scope.

record.name: ABodyBuilder3
record.description: Scalable antibody structure prediction model leveraging ProtT5 language-model embeddings with improved CDR-loop accuracy and per-residue pLDDT-style uncertainty (successor to ABodyBuilder2).
record.io: Antibody heavy/light chain sequences -> 3D antibody structure + predicted per-residue confidence (pLDDT)
record.status: HOLD — catalog eligibility or reusable-artifact evidence is unresolved; see audit note
record.use_cases: Antibody structure prediction, developability/engineering workflows, large-scale antibody modeling
record.audit_note: Identity and artifacts verify, but ABodyBuilder3 is a task-specific antibody structure predictor rather than a model broader than one task; HOLD or document a structural-model exception. Paper, repo.

review.reason: Identity and artifacts verify, but ABodyBuilder3 is a task-specific antibody structure predictor rather than a model broader than one task; HOLD or document a structural-model exception. Paper, repo.
review.reconsider_when: Reconsider only under a written structural-model exception or with evidence of broader reusable scope.

record.name: ScDiVa
record.description: Masked discrete-diffusion single-cell foundation model jointly modeling discrete gene identity and continuous expression magnitude with a bidirectional denoiser and latent anchor token; pretrained on 59M cells.
record.io: Masked/corrupted single-cell expression -> denoised gene identities + magnitudes, cell embeddings, generated cells
record.status: HOLD — paper only; no official reusable code or checkpoint verified
record.use_cases: Single-cell generation, dropout/sparsity-aware denoising, joint identity-and-expression modeling, representation learning
record.audit_note: paper-only with no released code or checkpoint. HOLD under the reusable-artifact rule.

review.reason: paper-only with no released code or checkpoint. HOLD under the reusable-artifact rule.
review.reconsider_when: Reconsider when official reusable code or a checkpoint is released and verified.

record.name: Tabula
record.description: Tabular self-supervised single-cell foundation model trained with federated learning, using combined gene-wise (column) reconstruction and cell-wise (row) contrastive objectives for privacy-preserving pretraining.
record.io: scRNA-seq expression (tabular) -> cell/gene embeddings, task predictions
record.status: HOLD — non-commercial training code only; no reusable pretrained checkpoint verified
record.use_cases: Batch correction, cell annotation, multi-omics integration, denoising/imputation, GRN inference, privacy-preserving pretraining
record.audit_note: set NC true, but repository has training code only and no pretrained checkpoint. HOLD until reusable weights exist.

review.reason: set NC true, but repository has training code only and no pretrained checkpoint. HOLD until reusable weights exist.
review.reconsider_when: Reconsider when an official reusable pretrained checkpoint is released and its terms are verified.

record.name: Virchow / Virchow2 (and Virchow2G)
record.description: Paige/MSK self-supervised ViT-H tile-level pathology foundation models. Virchow trained on 1.5M WSIs (632M params); Virchow2 on 3.1M+ WSIs; Virchow2G scales to 1.85B params (largest pathology encoder).
record.io: H&E histology tile -> tile-level embedding (frozen or fine-tuned feature extractor)
record.status: HOLD — family members have different gating, commercial access and model terms; split required
record.use_cases: Tile/slide-level cancer detection, rare cancer detection, biomarker prediction, pan-cancer downstream tasks
record.audit_note: Base paper; base model; official family access. Action: split the family or encode member-specific terms: base Virchow is gated Apache-2.0, Virchow2 is non-commercial research, and Virchow2G has different commercial access.

review.reason: Base paper; base model; official family access. Action: split the family or encode member-specific terms: base Virchow is gated Apache-2.0, Virchow2 is non-commercial research, and Virchow2G has different commercial access.
review.reconsider_when: Split the family or encode member-specific artifacts, access routes, and terms with primary evidence.

record.name: H-optimus-0 / H-optimus-1
record.description: Bioptimus 1.1B-parameter ViT pathology foundation models trained with self-supervised learning on hundreds of millions of tiles from 500k+ (H-0) to 1M+ (H-1) H&E slides across 4,000+ clinical centers.
record.io: H&E histology tile -> tile-level feature embedding
record.status: HOLD — catalog eligibility or reusable-artifact evidence is unresolved; see audit note
record.use_cases: Mutation prediction, survival analysis, tissue/cancer classification, biomarker prediction, WSI feature-extraction backbone
record.audit_note: “Paper” is a company announcement, H-optimus-1 is missing from artifacts and is gated CC BY-NC-ND. Add both model cards and accurate mixed terms.

review.reason: “Paper” is a company announcement, H-optimus-1 is missing from artifacts and is gated CC BY-NC-ND. Add both model cards and accurate mixed terms.
review.reconsider_when: Verify and link each model card and encode the family members' distinct access and reuse terms.

record.name: Atlas (RudolfV successor)
record.description: Aignostics/Mayo Clinic/Charite pathology foundation model (ViT-H/14, 632M params) built on the RudolfV pathologists-in-the-loop approach, trained on 1.2M WSIs across 70+ tissue and 100+ stain types.
record.io: Histology tile -> tile-level embedding
record.status: HOLD — no current public Atlas weight artifact verified; commercial access information only
record.use_cases: Pan-tissue cancer classification, biomarker prediction, WSI feature extraction across diverse stains/scanners
record.audit_note: Listed HF artifact returns no model; official Aignostics materials now describe flexible commercial licensing and Atlas 2, not open/gated Atlas weights. Replace the dead artifact and avoid “open code, gated weights” unless a current public release is found. Atlas paper, dead listed artifact, official model page, Atlas 2.

review.reason: Listed HF artifact returns no model; official Aignostics materials now describe flexible commercial licensing and Atlas 2, not open/gated Atlas weights. Replace the dead artifact and avoid “open code, gated weights” unless a current public release is found. Atlas paper, dead listed artifact, official model page, Atlas 2.
review.reconsider_when: Reconsider when a current official public artifact or endpoint and its exact access terms are verified.

record.name: BioReason
record.description: Architecture that embeds a DNA foundation model (Evo2/Nucleotide Transformer) directly into an LLM so the LLM reasons over raw genomic sequence as a first-class input via SFT + RL, producing interpretable multi-step reasoning.
record.io: Raw DNA sequence + text question -> multi-step biological reasoning / variant-effect / pathway answer with explanation
record.status: HOLD — checkpoints remain forthcoming; no reusable model artifact verified
record.use_cases: Mechanistic variant-effect explanation, KEGG disease-pathway reasoning, interpretable genomics QA
record.audit_note: repository still says checkpoints are forthcoming. HOLD until a reusable checkpoint is released.

review.reason: repository still says checkpoints are forthcoming. HOLD until a reusable checkpoint is released.
review.reconsider_when: Reconsider when the promised official checkpoints are released and their terms are verified.

record.name: OpenProtein.AI (PoET / PoET-2)
record.description: Commercial protein-design cloud platform plus the PoET-2 conditional, retrieval-augmented multimodal protein language foundation model (sequence+structure conditioning) for zero-shot variant effect prediction, embedding, scoring, and controllable generation.
record.io: Protein family/sequence (+ optional structure) -> embeddings, fitness/property scores, generated sequences
record.status: HOLD — platform/model identity overlaps PoET-2 and requires a distinct platform evidence boundary
record.use_cases: Protein engineering, zero-shot variant effect prediction, sequence-to-property model training, in silico screening
record.audit_note: set NC true and resolve duplication with bfm-poet-2. Narrow to the commercial platform or merge.

review.reason: set NC true and resolve duplication with bfm-poet-2. Narrow to the commercial platform or merge.
review.reconsider_when: Narrow to the platform or merge with the PoET-2 record while documenting the stable-ID disposition.

record.name: Pearl
record.description: Protein-ligand co-folding foundation model from Genesis Molecular AI using SO(3)-equivariant diffusion and large-scale synthetic training data, outperforming AlphaFold3 by 14.5% on the PoseBusters benchmark.
record.io: protein sequence + ligand SMILES -> co-folded all-atom protein-ligand 3D structure
record.status: HOLD — paper and project identity verified; no public model endpoint or reusable artifact verified
record.use_cases: structure-based drug discovery, binding pose prediction, virtual screening, small-molecule docking
record.audit_note: Only a paper is cited; “Web/API/commercial” lacks an official artifact locator. Official Genesis pages describe Pearl and an AI platform/partner access, not a public model endpoint. Paper, official Pearl page.

review.reason: Only a paper is cited; “Web/API/commercial” lacks an official artifact locator. Official Genesis pages describe Pearl and an AI platform/partner access, not a public model endpoint. Paper, official Pearl page.
review.reconsider_when: Reconsider when an official reusable model artifact or public endpoint and its terms are verified.

record.name: scTranslator
record.description: Pre-trained generative model that translates single-cell transcriptomes to proteomes in an align-free manner, enabling proteome inference from RNA data across diverse single-cell profiling technologies.
record.io: single-cell RNA expression -> single-cell protein abundance
record.status: HOLD — catalog eligibility or reusable-artifact evidence is unresolved; see audit note
record.use_cases: multi-omics inference from RNA-only data, transcriptome-to-proteome translation, cross-technology single-cell integration
record.audit_note: Code/checkpoints are public but no licence file is present, and the model is a single RNA-to-protein translation task. HOLD or explicitly document both scope and no-licence limitations. Paper, repo.

review.reason: Code/checkpoints are public but no licence file is present, and the model is a single RNA-to-protein translation task. HOLD or explicitly document both scope and no-licence limitations. Paper, repo.
review.reconsider_when: Reconsider when scope eligibility and explicit code/checkpoint reuse terms are both resolved.

record.name: ChemBERTa-3
record.description: Open training framework and benchmark suite for chemical foundation models.
record.status: HOLD — public training framework/model links; exact reuse licence not confirmed
record.io: SMILES -> embeddings/task heads
record.use_cases: Re-training and benchmarking chemical encoders
record.audit_note: Paper; artifact. Action: reclassify as a training platform/framework and change “open” to “public source/model links; reuse licence unconfirmed/HOLD”.

review.reason: Paper; artifact. Action: reclassify as a training platform/framework and change “open” to “public source/model links; reuse licence unconfirmed/HOLD”.
review.reconsider_when: Reconsider after platform scope and explicit reuse terms for the released framework/model artifacts are verified.

record.name: GeneCompass
record.description: Knowledge-informed cross-species foundation model for gene regulation.
record.status: HOLD — public code/checkpoints; no confirmed reuse licence
record.io: scRNA + biological priors -> gene/cell embeddings and GRN predictions
record.use_cases: Regulatory mechanisms, fate regulator discovery, target discovery
record.audit_note: Paper; artifact. Action: replace “open” with “public code and checkpoints; reuse licence unconfirmed/HOLD”.

review.reason: Paper; artifact. Action: replace “open” with “public code and checkpoints; reuse licence unconfirmed/HOLD”.
review.reconsider_when: Reconsider when explicit code and checkpoint reuse terms are confirmed from an official source.

record.name: HybriDNA
record.description: Microsoft decoder-only hybrid Transformer-Mamba2 DNA foundation model handling up to 131 kb at single-nucleotide resolution for both understanding and generation; SOTA on 33 DNA-understanding datasets.
record.io: DNA sequence up to 131 kb -> embeddings/likelihoods (understanding) and generated DNA (generation)
record.status: HOLD — paper verified; no provenance-confirmed reusable artifact found
record.use_cases: Long-range DNA understanding (BEND/GUE/LRB tasks), regulatory element generation, variant/expression tasks
record.audit_note: Paper; no provenance-confirmed official artifact found. Action: retain paper-only/HOLD.

review.reason: Paper; no provenance-confirmed official artifact found. Action: retain paper-only/HOLD.
review.reconsider_when: Reconsider when a provenance-confirmed official reusable model artifact is released and verified.

record.name: GeneMamba
record.description: Single-cell transcriptomics foundation model on a bidirectional Bi-Mamba (state-space) backbone for linear-time gene-context modeling, pretrained on ~30M CELLxGENE cells with pathway-aware contrastive loss and rank-based gene encoding.
record.io: scRNA-seq expression vector -> cell/gene embeddings, downstream task heads
record.status: HOLD — public code/weights; no confirmed reuse licence
record.use_cases: Cell type annotation, multi-batch integration, long-transcriptome modeling, gene-gene correlation analysis
record.audit_note: Paper; code; weights. Action: qualify as public code/weights with no confirmed reuse licence; HOLD the “open” claim.

review.reason: Paper; code; weights. Action: qualify as public code/weights with no confirmed reuse licence; HOLD the “open” claim.
review.reconsider_when: Reconsider when explicit reuse terms for the official code and weights are confirmed.

record.name: scMMGPT
record.description: Single-cell multimodal generative pretrained transformer linking a cell PLM and a text PLM via cell-to-text and text-to-cell cross-modal projectors, pretrained on 27M CELLxGENE cells.
record.io: Cell expression and/or text -> cell description text, generated pseudo-cells, annotations
record.status: HOLD — public source skeleton; weights and licence not confirmed
record.use_cases: Cell annotation and clustering, text-to-cell generation, cell-to-text description, cross-modal reasoning
record.audit_note: Paper; repository. Action: change “open code” to “public source skeleton; weights and licence unconfirmed/HOLD”.

review.reason: Paper; repository. Action: change “open code” to “public source skeleton; weights and licence unconfirmed/HOLD”.
review.reconsider_when: Reconsider when official reusable weights and explicit reuse terms are both confirmed.

record.name: PLIP (Pathology Language-Image Pretraining)
record.description: First vision-language pathology foundation model; a CLIP fine-tuned on the OpenPath dataset of ~208,414 pathology image-text pairs curated from medical Twitter.
record.io: Pathology image and/or text -> aligned CLIP-style embeddings; zero-shot classification and image/text retrieval
record.status: HOLD — public code/weights; reuse terms not confirmed
record.use_cases: Zero-shot tissue classification, image-to-image and text-to-image retrieval, knowledge sharing/search across pathology cases
record.audit_note: Paper; code; weights. Action: change “open” to “public code/weights; reuse terms unresolved/HOLD”; neither current official location provides a confirmed licence.

review.reason: Paper; code; weights. Action: change “open” to “public code/weights; reuse terms unresolved/HOLD”; neither current official location provides a confirmed licence.
review.reconsider_when: Reconsider when explicit reuse terms for the official code and weights are confirmed.

record.name: NExT-Mol
record.description: Combines a 1.8B-parameter SELFIES-pretrained molecular LLM (MoLlama) with a 3D diffusion transformer for de novo 3D molecule generation and conformer prediction.
record.io: SELFIES molecular sequence -> de novo 3D molecules and conformer geometries
record.status: HOLD — public code/checkpoints; no confirmed reuse licence
record.use_cases: de novo drug design, conformer prediction, structure-based virtual screening
record.audit_note: Paper; artifact; weights. Action: qualify as public code/checkpoints with reuse licence unconfirmed/HOLD.

review.reason: Paper; artifact; weights. Action: qualify as public code/checkpoints with reuse licence unconfirmed/HOLD.
review.reconsider_when: Reconsider when explicit reuse terms for the official code and checkpoints are confirmed.

record.name: Lingshu-Cell
record.description: Alibaba DAMO Academy masked discrete diffusion model that generates whole-transcriptome expression distributions across ~18,000 genes without prior gene selection, achieving top performance on the Virtual Cell Challenge H1 perturbation benchmark.
record.io: scRNA-seq gene expression profiles + perturbation conditions -> whole-transcriptome expression distributions (~18,000 genes)
record.status: HOLD — paper/project page only; official collection did not contain a released model
record.use_cases: perturbation response prediction, virtual cell simulation, transcriptomic distribution modeling, drug effect prediction
record.audit_note: Paper; official collection; project. Action: downgrade “model hub” to paper/project page; the official collection currently contains the paper, not a model.

review.reason: Paper; official collection; project. Action: downgrade “model hub” to paper/project page; the official collection currently contains the paper, not a model.
review.reconsider_when: Reconsider when the official collection contains a released reusable model artifact with verified terms.
